fields.title: Restrict Ralph loop agents with configurable default allowlist
fields.description: Ralph-owned sessions should use a narrower default agent state than normal sessions. The default Ralph loop state should allow only finder and librarian, while remaining configurable from project settings.
fields.design: Add Ralph-aware effective agent availability layered on top of existing tau.agents.enabled session/project settings. Detect Ralph-owned sessions from Ralph state files, apply a Ralph allowlist from .pi/settings.json under tau.ralph.agents.enabled, and default that allowlist to [finder, librarian]. Use the effective state for agent spawn checks, agent tool descriptions, and /agents list output. Keep /agents session-scoped behavior intact; Ralph policy is an additional overlay rather than a replacement for the normal session selection.
fields.acceptance_criteria: In Ralph-owned sessions, only finder and librarian are enabled by default unless tau.ralph.agents.enabled overrides the allowlist. Agent spawns blocked by Ralph policy fail cleanly. /agents list and agent tool availability reflect the effective Ralph session state. Normal non-Ralph sessions continue using the existing tau.agents.enabled behavior.
